prompt: I want to launch an employee advocacy program for our 150-person SaaS company. We already use Hootsuite. Should I use Amplify or something else?
assertions: Compares Hootsuite Amplify with at least one standalone advocacy platform on feature depth
Considers the benefit of integration with their existing Hootsuite setup
Discusses AI-powered personalization as a differentiator for standalone tools

prompt: Our employee advocacy program has 10% participation. How do I get more people sharing?
assertions: Addresses executive participation as a key driver of adoption
Recommends gamification tactics like leaderboards or competitions to boost engagement
Mentions content quality and suggests auditing whether the content is genuinely shareable

prompt: How do I measure the ROI of employee advocacy to justify the budget?
assertions: Explains earned media value as a way to quantify organic reach in dollar terms
Recommends tracking clicks and attributing website traffic from advocacy links
Suggests comparing advocacy cost-per-reach against paid social equivalents
